mapper.select: select count(1) from realm where id = #{realmId} and status = 1
mapper.insert: insert into account_credential ( id, account_id, realm_id, credential_type, credential_value, password_salt, password_algo, force_change, status, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{account.id}, #{account.id}, #{account.realmId}, 1, #{passwordHash}, #{passwordSalt}, #{passwordAlgo}, case when #{forceReset} = true then 1 else 0 end, 1, now(), now() ) on duplicate key update credential_value = values(credential_value), password_salt = values(password_salt), password_algo = values(password_algo), force_change = values(force_change), status = 1, update_time = now()
mapper.select: select sm.id as memberId, s.id as subjectId, s.code as subjectCode, s.name as subjectName, st.name as subjectTypeName, root_subject.name as rootSubjectName, sm.member_type as memberType, case sm.member_type when 1 then 'OWNER' when 2 then 'ADMIN' when 3 then 'MEMBER' when 4 then 'STAFF' else 'UNKNOWN' end as memberTypeName, sm.status as memberStatus, s.status as subjectStatus, sm.joined_at as joinedAt from subject_member sm inner join subject s on s.id = sm.subject_id left join subject_type st on st.id = s.subject_type_id left join subject root_subject on root_subject.id = s.root_subject_id where sm.account_id = #{accountId} order by sm.joined_at desc, sm.create_time desc

select ei.id, ei.provider_type as providerType, ei.provider_code as providerCode, coalesce(p.provider_name, ei.provider_code) as providerName, ei.external_user_id as externalUserId, ei.external_union_id as externalUnionId, ei.external_app_id as externalAppId, ei.external_nickname as externalNickname, ei.external_avatar as externalAvatar, ei.status, ei.bind_at as bindAt, ei.last_login_time as lastLoginTime from iam_account_external_identity ei left join iam_realm_identity_provider p on p.id = ei.provider_id where ei.account_id = #{accountId} order by ei.bind_at desc, ei.create_time desc
